prompt: In the exact engraved chromolithograph style of the food illustration in the attached reference: a large burrito wrapped in a golden flour tortilla, cut in half and angled to show the filling of wide curry-gold hand-pulled noodle ribbons, seasoned beef, and green peppers inside. Hand-tinted color washes over warm ochre engraved linework: toasted gold tortilla with grill marks, rich curry-gold noodle filling, fresh green pepper flecks, warm brown seasoned beef, a sheen of chili-oil red. Centered on a plain flat harvest gold (#E0AC45) background with NOTHING else - no border, no frame, no text, no table scene. Do not copy any layout, border, or text from the reference. Subject fills about 70% of the frame. Bright and vivid, no darkening, no aging wash, no shadows. Flat traditional print illustration, no photorealism.
